vocab.meaning: người diễn thuyết/giảng bài lôi cuốn
vocab.example: My history teacher was a captivating orator who could make even the most tedious events come alive.
She possessed a wealth of knowledge in her field, which earned her immense respect from all her students.
He had a unique way of imparting knowledge that made complex theories surprisingly easy to grasp.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy/nuôi dưỡng niềm đam mê cho cái gì
vocab.example: It was my high school mentor who instilled a passion for literature in me that persists to this day.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm/khó phai
vocab.example: Her unwavering patience and kindness left a lasting impression on me throughout my formative years.

vocab.meaning: dễ gần và biết cảm thông
vocab.example: What I loved most was that she was incredibly approachable and empathetic whenever we faced personal struggles.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng tầm hiểu biết/tầm mắt
vocab.example: My favorite teacher always encouraged us to read beyond the syllabus to broaden our horizons.
He wasn't just an instructor; he was a true role model who taught us the value of integrity.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy/tạo dựng môi trường học tập tích cực
vocab.example: She had a knack for fostering a positive learning environment where everyone felt comfortable sharing their ideas.

vocab.meaning: vượt xa mong đợi/trách nhiệm (tận tâm)
vocab.example: He often stayed late after class to help struggling students, truly going beyond the call of duty.
